Thanks for the PR! A short description of the change is enough — focus on

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullets describing the change and the motivation. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bash tests/run.sh` passes locally
- [ ] No new shellcheck errors
- [ ] If a `lib/` module was added, it has a numeric prefix and ends with `return 99`
- [ ] If a user-facing command was added, it's wired into help text, bash completion, and the interactive menu
- [ ] README and `docs/index.html` updated if behaviour or surface area changed
- [ ] If a release: `version.conf` bumped
